description: Minimal TFT-based spacetime model using triadic time (D3/D6/D9) and nested local dimensions. No SET, S-N-R, or FFF. Transitional performance-boosted spacetime prior to triadic substrate adoption.

D6.notes: Intermediate harmonic; enables nested dimensional transitions.

D9.notes: Top-level triadic time; governs coherence across nested dimensions.

local_nested.notes: Primary spatial layer; behaves like classical 3D.
Derived from D6 temporal harmonics; supports local curvature modulation.
Aligned with D9; enables proto-triadic behavior without full RTT substrate.

temporal_shift.invariant: Δt remains proportional across harmonic layers

steps: Apply temporal_shift to enter D6 harmonic layer.
Use harmonic_lift to align with D9 triadic envelope.
Perform dimensional_nesting to activate L3 triadic extension.
example_usage.expected_outcome: Enhanced stability and performance without requiring full RTT substrate.
